targets.notes: Combined scope 1, 2 (market-based), and 3 emissions reduction ambition validated by SBTi using the Corporate Near-Term Criteria Version 5.2 and cross-sector absolute reduction method; boundary for carbon reduction and net-zero ambitions was adjusted in 2025 to exclude certain scope 3 emissions activities that are peripheral to core operations or where ability to influence emissions reductions is limited.
targets.title: 50% absolute reduction in combined Scope 1, 2 (market-based), and 3 emissions by 2030 from 2019 base year

targets.notes: Ambition to reach net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030, including plans to invest in carbon removal solutions to neutralize remaining emissions; net-zero ambition allows for 50% remaining emissions by the 2030 ambition date and therefore doesn’t meet SBTi’s long-term net-zero residual emissions criteria.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030
